error.signature: Error: flash write failed at address 0x08000000, expected 0xFF read back 0x00

verdict.summary: Flash programming fails. Write-protection enabled, flash not erased, or voltage too low for programming.

dead_ends.action: Retry flashing repeatedly without erasing first
dead_ends.why_fails: Flash can only be written 1->0. If not erased (all 0xFF), writes silently corrupt. Always erase before write.

dead_ends.action: Increase SWD clock speed for faster flash writes
dead_ends.why_fails: Flash programming speed is limited by internal charge pump, not SWD clock. Faster clock increases errors.

workarounds.how: openocd: flash erase_sector 0 0 last  # or use mass_erase

workarounds.action: Remove flash write protection via option bytes
workarounds.how: STM32CubeProgrammer -> Option Bytes -> Write Protection -> Uncheck all sectors

workarounds.action: Check supply voltage is above minimum for flash programming
workarounds.how: STM32F4 needs >= 2.7V for word programming. Brown-out during flash causes corruption.
